# What does this PR do?

<!-- Summarise the change in a sentence or two. -->

Fixes # (issue)

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New component (dataset / model / unlearning method / evaluation metric / scenario)
- [ ] Framework feature (runner, distributed strategy, logging, tooling)
- [ ] Documentation only

## Before submitting

- [ ] This PR only fixes a typo or improves docs (if so, you can ignore the checks below).
- [ ] I have read the [contributing guide](../docs/contributing.md).
- [ ] `make quality` passes locally (ruff lint + format check), or I ran `make style` to auto-fix.
- [ ] New components are registered and documented per [`docs/extending.md`](../docs/extending.md).
- [ ] I updated the relevant docs / README where behaviour or usage changed.
